get.description: Returns health status of the API gateway and its dependencies. Returns 200 for healthy/degraded, 503 for unhealthy.

503.description: Service is unhealthy — all dependencies are down

get.description: Returns detailed status of all system components including database, Redis, and microservices. Used by OpenStatus monitoring.
Returns whether the service is ready to accept traffic
Returns whether the service process is alive

post.description: Record user consent for a legal document (e.g. terms of service, privacy policy)

delete.description: Withdraw previously given consent for a legal document

get.description: Check whether a user has consented to a specific legal document and whether re-consent is needed

post.description: Record or update cookie consent preferences for a visitor

get.description: Retrieve current cookie consent preferences for a visitor or user
List all active legal documents, optionally filtered by locale and type
Retrieve a specific legal document by its slug

post.description: Submit a contact form inquiry. Responses are typically provided within 1-2 business days.
Accepts a batch of events (1-1000) and persists them to ClickHouse bronze.

400.description: Tenant mismatch between authenticated context and event payload

get.summary: List available agents for the current tenant
List agent conversations for current user

post.description: Proxy chat completion requests to upstream LLM providers. Requires sk-sailor-* API key.
Returns the full key ONCE. Store it securely — it cannot be retrieved later.

key.description: Full API key — shown only once. Store it securely.

get.summary: List API keys for the current organization

delete.description: Soft-delete: sets revokedAt. Invalidates Redis cache.

get.summary: Aggregated usage for a billing period

post.summary: Append an entry to the usage ledger (idempotent)
post.description: Writes a single row to UsageLedgerEntry. The idempotencyKey is mandatory: replaying the same key for the same tenant returns the first-write record untouched with duplicate=true and a 200 status.

get.description: Public endpoint for marketing display — no authentication required.

post.summary: Create a credit purchase checkout session
post.description: Creates a provider-agnostic checkout session (Stripe / Polar / LemonSqueezy / ChinaPay). Provider is auto-detected from env.

get.description: Returns recent in-app notifications for the current user and organization.

get.summary: List all integrations for the current organization
Get integration by ID (returns decrypted credentials and settings)
Get organization details with live usage
Cross-tenant usage report for current billing period

post.summary: Acknowledge a DLQ entry (remove from queue)
Set a per-tenant feature flag override

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events for subscription lifecycle management. Signature verification is handled by the Stripe SDK.

200.description: Webhook received and queued for processing

post.description: Receives Clerk webhook events for user and organization lifecycle management. Signature verification is handled by the Svix SDK.

200.description: Webhook received and queued for processing

400.description: Invalid signature or missing svix headers
